HomePage.title: Sozu: Digital dollars that work with you
HomePage.subtitle: SOZU CAPITAL
HomePage.description: An internet-native way to use money — transparent, programmable, yours.

sozuPay.title: Sozu Pay
sozuPay.subtitle: NGO + Business dashboards for stablecoin payments
sozuPay.description: Manage disbursements, beneficiaries, and payouts with DeFi yield baked in. NGO dashboard for microcredit; Business dashboard for merchants. One stack for programmable dollar payments.

credit.title: Sozu Credit
credit.subtitle: Credit built on trust — not paperwork
credit.description: Access credit through community vouching. Interest rates and credit amounts scale with your trust score. Good behavior unlocks bigger funds. Transparent requirements and terms.

wallet.title: Sozu Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Auto-compounding yield, self-custodial
wallet.description: Stellar-powered USDC wallet with Passkey authentication. Idle balance earns DeFi yield (auto-compounding). Your keys, your funds. Built for recipients and everyday use.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From donation to empowerment
howItWorks.description: Donors fund micro-credit batches. Funds flow into on-chain Sozu Vaults generating DeFi yield (10-15% APY). Yield supports trust-based credit lines for verified entrepreneurs. Every transaction visible through TRUFA Proof of Allocation.

business.title: Sozu for Business
business.subtitle: Merchant settlement and revenue in stablecoins
business.description: Receive payments in USDC, track revenue, and manage payouts from one dashboard. DeFi yield on idle balance. Built for SMEs and operators in Latam.
